author: Shadow6six using AI
install_msg:
MusicLinker has been installed!

It will automatically detect Spotify and YouTube music links and reply with a cross-platform search link and a Brave lyrics search.

Use `[p]musiclinker` to configure settings.

For full artist/album metadata on Spotify links, set your Spotify API credentials with:
`[p]musiclinker spotifyapi <client_id> <client_secret>`
(Run this in DMs for privacy!)
name: MusicLinker
short: Cross-platform music link helper with lyrics search.
description: Detects Spotify track links and YouTube video links in chat messages. Replies with a search link to the opposing platform (Spotify <-> YouTube) and a Brave Search link for lyrics. Optionally uses the Spotify Web API for full artist, album, and track metadata.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end user data. It only reads message content in real time to detect music links. Spotify API credentials are stored in the bot's config if provided by the bot owner.
